gt_sql: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE Id = ( SELECT OwnerUserId FROM posts ORDER BY ViewCount DESC LIMIT 1 )
pred_sql: SELECT TRIM(u.DisplayName) AS DisplayName FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id WHERE p.ViewCount IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p.ViewCount DESC LIMIT 1;
question: What is the owner's display name of the most popular post?
